# fc-sandbox-sdk

> TypeScript SDK for the fc-spawn microVM sandbox control plane.
> Zero runtime dependencies. ESM-only. Node 20+ / Bun / Deno / edge / browser.
> Hand-written HTTP client around `fetch`. Retries, typed errors, NDJSON
> streaming, runtime detection, header/URL redaction, lifecycle hooks.

## Install

```
npm install fc-sandbox-sdk
```

## Docs

- [README](README.md) — top-level overview
- [Quickstart](docs/quickstart.md) — 30-second tour
- [How-to: streaming](docs/how-to/streaming.md) — `streamCommand` union
- [How-to: error handling](docs/how-to/error-handling.md) — typed errors
- [How-to: observability](docs/how-to/observability.md) — `onRequest` / `onResponse` / `onRetry`
- [API reference](docs/reference/index.html) — TypeDoc output
- [Design rationale](docs/explanation/sdk-analysis.md) — handle model, retry policy, competitive analysis
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md) — release history + deprecation policy

## Examples

- [01-hello-world](examples/01-hello-world/) — create / run / destroy
- [02-code-interpreter](examples/02-code-interpreter/) — Python REPL pattern, including `streamCommand`
- [03-dev-server-preview-url](examples/03-dev-server-preview-url/) — ingress + previewUrl
- [04-ai-code-agent](examples/04-ai-code-agent/) — Sandbox as a code agent runner
- [05-filesystem-snapshots](examples/05-filesystem-snapshots/) — pause / fork / resume
- [06-openai-agents-fc-tools](examples/06-openai-agents-fc-tools/) — Sandbox as an OpenAI agent tool
- [07-docker-custom-template](examples/07-docker-custom-template/) — `client.templates.create`
- [08-dev-server-git-preview](examples/08-dev-server-git-preview/) — git clone + dev server
- [09-mcp-claude-code](examples/09-mcp-claude-code/) — host an MCP server
- [10-mcp-browserbase](examples/10-mcp-browserbase/) — MCP + Browserbase
- [11-tigerfs-postgres-filesystem](examples/11-tigerfs-postgres-filesystem/) — TigerFS + Postgres
- [12-radicle-multi-agent](examples/12-radicle-multi-agent/) — Radicle p2p git mesh, multi-agent

## Surface highlights

- `FcClient` — entry point (catalog, identity, sandbox factory, templates, networks, disks).
- `Sandbox` — stateful handle (lifecycle, commands, files, ingress, network attach/detach).
- `FcError` hierarchy — `FcAuthError`, `FcPermissionError`, `FcNotFoundError`,
  `FcValidationError`, `FcRateLimitError`, `FcServerError`, `FcConnectionError`, `FcTimeoutError`.
- `ClientHooks` — `onRequest`, `onResponse`, `onRetry` with pre-redacted payloads.
- `ExecStreamEvent` — discriminated union from `streamCommand`.

## Source

Public surface lives in `src/index.ts`. Wire types mirror Go control-plane
handlers in the sibling `fc` repository (`../fc/internal/control/`).
